category_sources: Official homepage describes GiNaC as a C++ library for embedded symbolic manipulations and algebraic capabilities.
source_facts.description says GiNaC is not a computer algebra system.
display_name_sources: Official homepage consistently uses the stylized display name GiNaC.
docs_sources: Official homepage links to Tutorial and Developer's Reference documentation.
The tutorial page documents GiNaC 1.8.10 as an open framework for symbolic computation in C++.
repo_sources: Official GiNaC homepage links to a Codeberg Git repository.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Official homepage states GiNaC is a C++ library for symbolic manipulations and algebraic capabilities.
Official tutorial describes GiNaC as an open framework for symbolic computation within C++.
